Alias.name: g_channels_cmd
Alias.script: if GCH and GCH.command then GCH.command(matches[2] or "") end

Alias.name: g_channels_send_gchan
Alias.script: if GCH and GCH.send_gchan then GCH.send_gchan(matches[2] or "") end

Script.name: g_channels_main
Script.script:
GCH = GCH or {}
local BATCH_SIZE = 10
local unpack_fn = table.unpack or unpack
GCH.uuid_prefix = string.format("%x%x%x", os.time(), math.random(0, 2^30), math.random(0, 2^30)) GCH.uuid_counter = 0 function GCH.new_uuid() GCH.uuid_counter = GCH.uuid_counter + 1 return GCH.uuid_prefix .. "-" .. GCH.uuid_counter end
local function gch_persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end GCH.legacy_state_file = gch_persistence_dir() .. "/g_channels_state.lua" GCH.settings_file = gch_persistence_dir() .. "/g_channels_settings.json" GCH.db_file = gch_persistence_dir() .. "/g_channels.db" GCH.pending_file = gch_persistence_dir() .. "/g_channels_pending.jsonl" GCH.gchan_default_color = "36,120,200" GCH.defaults = { x = "70%", y = "0%", width = "30%", height = "60%", fontsize = 9, active_tab = "All", visible = true, display_size = 500, show_timestamp = true, debug = false, gag_channel_tags = true, gchan_color = GCH.gchan_default_color, gchan_echo = false, } GCH.tab_order = { "All", "Clan", "Question", "Group", "Tell", "Say", "Spouse", "Gchan" } GCH.tab_to_history = { Question = "question", Group = "group", Tell = "tell", Say = "say", Spouse = "spouse", Clan = "clan", Gchan = "gchan" } GCH.tab_to_channel_key = { All = "all", Question = "question", Group = "group", Tell = "tell", Say = "say", Spouse = "spouse", Clan = "clan", Gchan = "gchan", } GCH.history_channels = { question = true, group = true, tell = true, say = true, spouse = true, clan = true, gchan = true } GCH.channel_labels = { all = "All", question = "Question", group = "Group", tell = "Tell", say = "Say", spouse = "Spouse", clan = "Clan", gchan = "gchan", } GCH.aard_colors = { b = {0, 0, 170}, B = {85, 85, 255}, c = {0, 170, 170}, C = {85, 255, 255}, r = {170, 0, 0}, R = {255, 85, 85}, m = {170, 0, 170}, M = {255, 85, 255}, g = {0, 170, 0}, G = {85, 255, 85}, y = {170, 170, 0}, Y = {255, 255, 85}, w = {192, 192, 192}, W = {255, 255, 255}, D = {128, 128, 128}, } GCH.state = GCH.state or {} GCH.ui = GCH.ui or { tabs = {}, consoles = {} } GCH.buffer = GCH.buffer or {}
function GCH.merge_defaults() if type(GCH.state) ~= "table" then GCH.state = {} end
if GCH.state.font ~= nil and GCH.state.fontsize == nil then GCH.state.fontsize = GCH.state.font end GCH.state.font = nil
for k, v in pairs(GCH.defaults) do if GCH.state[k] == nil then GCH.state[k] = v end end
if GCH.state.active_tab == "Private" or GCH.state.active_tab == "Wangrp" then GCH.state.active_tab = "Question" end if GCH.state.active_tab == "gchan" then GCH.state.active_tab = "Gchan" end
local valid = false for _, tab in ipairs(GCH.tab_order) do if tab == GCH.state.active_tab then valid = true break end end if not valid then GCH.state.active_tab = GCH.defaults.active_tab end
GCH.state.display_size = tonumber(GCH.state.display_size) or GCH.defaults.display_size if GCH.state.display_size < 1 then GCH.state.display_size = 1 end if GCH.state.show_timestamp == nil then GCH.state.show_timestamp = true end if GCH.state.gag_channel_tags == nil then GCH.state.gag_channel_tags = true end if type(GCH.state.gchan_color) ~= "string" or GCH.state.gchan_color == "" then GCH.state.gchan_color = GCH.gchan_default_color end
GCH.state.history_enabled = GCH.state.history_enabled or {} if GCH.state.history_enabled.question == nil and GCH.state.history_enabled.wangrp ~= nil then GCH.state.history_enabled.question = GCH.state.history_enabled.wangrp end GCH.state.history_enabled.wangrp = nil
for chan, _ in pairs(GCH.history_channels) do if GCH.state.history_enabled[chan] == nil then GCH.state.history_enabled[chan] = true end end
GCH.state.history = nil GCH.state.channel_colors = nil end
function GCH.json_encode(v) if not (yajl and yajl.to_string) then return nil end local ok, s = pcall(yajl.to_string, v) if ok then return s end return nil end
function GCH.json_decode(s) if not (yajl and yajl.to_value) then return nil end local ok, v = pcall(yajl.to_value, s) if ok then return v end return nil end
function GCH.read_legacy_state() local f = io.open(GCH.legacy_state_file, "r") if not f then return nil end f:close()
if type(table.load) == "function" then local loaded = {} local ok = pcall(table.load, GCH.legacy_state_file, loaded) if ok and type(loaded) == "table" and next(loaded) ~= nil then return loaded end end
local chunk = loadfile(GCH.legacy_state_file) if chunk then local ok, result = pcall(chunk) if ok and type(result) == "table" then if result.fontsize ~= nil or result.display_size ~= nil or result.history_enabled ~= nil or result.channel_colors ~= nil then return result end if type(result[1]) == "table" then return result[1] end return result end end
local fh = io.open(GCH.legacy_state_file, "r") if fh then local raw = fh:read("*a") fh:close() local decoded = GCH.json_decode(raw) if type(decoded) == "table" then return decoded end end
return nil end
function GCH.migrate_legacy_settings() local legacy = GCH.read_legacy_state() if type(legacy) ~= "table" then return {} end
local migrated = {} for _, k in ipairs({ "x", "y", "width", "height", "fontsize", "font", "active_tab", "visible", "display_size", "show_timestamp", "debug", "gag_channel_tags" }) do if legacy[k] ~= nil then migrated[k] = legacy[k] end end
if type(legacy.history_enabled) == "table" then migrated.history_enabled = {} for k, v in pairs(legacy.history_enabled) do migrated.history_enabled[k] = v end end
if type(legacy.channel_colors) == "table" and type(legacy.channel_colors.gchan) == "string" and legacy.channel_colors.gchan ~= "" then migrated.gchan_color = legacy.channel_colors.gchan end
return migrated end
function GCH.load_settings() local f = io.open(GCH.settings_file, "r") if f then local raw = f:read("*a") f:close() local decoded = GCH.json_decode(raw) if type(decoded) == "table" then GCH.state = decoded GCH.merge_defaults() return end end
GCH.state = GCH.migrate_legacy_settings() GCH.merge_defaults() GCH.save_settings() end
function GCH.save_settings() if not GCH.state then return false end
if GCH.ui and GCH.ui.container then if GCH.ui.container.get_x then GCH.state.x = GCH.ui.container:get_x() end if GCH.ui.container.get_y then GCH.state.y = GCH.ui.container:get_y() end if GCH.ui.container.get_width then GCH.state.width = GCH.ui.container:get_width() end if GCH.ui.container.get_height then GCH.state.height = GCH.ui.container:get_height() end end
local payload = GCH.json_encode(GCH.state) if not payload then return false end
local f = io.open(GCH.settings_file, "w") if not f then return false end f:write(payload) f:close() return true end
function GCH.open_db() if GCH.db then return true end
local ok, mod = pcall(require, "lsqlite3") if not ok or type(mod) ~= "table" then ok, mod = pcall(require, "lsqlite3complete") end if not ok or type(mod) ~= "table" then GCH.print_main("g_channels: sqlite3 unavailable, persistence disabled") return false end
GCH.sqlite3 = mod local db, _, err = mod.open(GCH.db_file) if not db then GCH.print_main("g_channels: failed to open db: " .. tostring(err)) return false end
db:exec("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL") db:exec("PRAGMA synchronous=NORMAL") db:exec([[CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS messages ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, channel TEXT NOT NULL, ts INTEGER NOT NULL, msg TEXT NOT NULL, decho TEXT, uuid TEXT )]]) pcall(function() db:exec("ALTER TABLE messages ADD COLUMN uuid TEXT") end) db:exec("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_channel_ts ON messages(channel, ts)") db:exec("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_uuid ON messages(uuid) WHERE uuid IS NOT NULL")
GCH.db = db return true end
function GCH.close_db() if GCH.db then pcall(function() GCH.db:close() end) GCH.db = nil end end
function GCH.append_pending(item) if not item.uuid then item.uuid = GCH.new_uuid() end local payload = GCH.json_encode(item) if not payload then return false end
local f = io.open(GCH.pending_file, "a") if not f then return false end f:write(payload, "\n") f:flush() f:close()
GCH.pending_count = (GCH.pending_count or 0) + 1 return true end
function GCH.drain_pending() if not GCH.db then return false end
local f = io.open(GCH.pending_file, "r") if not f then GCH.pending_count = 0 return true end
local rows = {} for line in f:lines() do if line and line ~= "" then local item = GCH.json_decode(line) if type(item) == "table" and type(item.channel) == "string" and type(item.msg) == "string" then rows[#rows + 1] = item end end end f:close()
if #rows == 0 then os.remove(GCH.pending_file) GCH.pending_count = 0 return true end
local sqlite3 = GCH.sqlite3 local DONE = sqlite3 and sqlite3.DONE or 101 local OK = sqlite3 and sqlite3.OK or 0
if GCH.db:exec("BEGIN") ~= OK then GCH.print_main("g_channels: pending drain BEGIN failed; lines retained") return false end
local stmt = GCH.db:prepare("INSERT OR IGNORE INTO messages (channel, ts, msg, decho, uuid) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)") if not stmt then GCH.db:exec("ROLLBACK") GCH.print_main("g_channels: pending drain prepare failed; lines retained") return false end
local failed = false for _, item in ipairs(rows) do if stmt:bind_values(item.channel, tonumber(item.ts) or os.time(), item.msg, item.decho, item.uuid) ~= OK then failed = true break end if stmt:step() ~= DONE then failed = true break end stmt:reset() end stmt:finalize()
if failed then GCH.db:exec("ROLLBACK") GCH.print_main("g_channels: pending drain step failed; lines retained") return false end
if GCH.db:exec("COMMIT") ~= OK then GCH.db:exec("ROLLBACK") GCH.print_main("g_channels: pending commit failed; lines retained") return false end
os.remove(GCH.pending_file) GCH.pending_count = 0 return true end
function GCH.maybe_drain() if (GCH.pending_count or 0) >= BATCH_SIZE then GCH.drain_pending() end end
function GCH.read_pending_rows(channel_filter) local f = io.open(GCH.pending_file, "r") if not f then return {} end local rows = {} for line in f:lines() do if line and line ~= "" then local item = GCH.json_decode(line) if type(item) == "table" and type(item.channel) == "string" and type(item.msg) == "string" then if channel_filter == "all" or channel_filter == item.channel then rows[#rows + 1] = { channel = item.channel, ts = tonumber(item.ts), msg = item.msg, decho = item.decho } end end end end f:close() return rows end
local function trim_tail(rows, lim) if #rows <= lim then return rows end local trimmed = {} for i = #rows - lim + 1, #rows do trimmed[#trimmed + 1] = rows[i] end return trimmed end
function GCH.fetch_history(channel_key, limit) GCH.drain_pending() local lim = math.max(tonumber(limit) or 1, 1) local rows = {}
if GCH.db then local sql, stmt if channel_key == "all" then sql = "SELECT channel, ts, msg, decho FROM messages ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT ?" stmt = GCH.db:prepare(sql) if stmt then stmt:bind_values(lim) end else sql = "SELECT channel, ts, msg, decho FROM messages WHERE channel = ? ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT ?" stmt = GCH.db:prepare(sql) if stmt then stmt:bind_values(channel_key, lim) end end
if stmt then local desc = {} for row in stmt:nrows() do desc[#desc + 1] = { channel = row.channel, ts = tonumber(row.ts), msg = row.msg, decho = row.decho } end stmt:finalize() for i = #desc, 1, -1 do rows[#rows + 1] = desc[i] end end end
for _, r in ipairs(GCH.read_pending_rows(channel_key)) do rows[#rows + 1] = r end return trim_tail(rows, lim) end
function GCH.fetch_search(channel_key, needle, limit) GCH.drain_pending() local query = tostring(needle or "") local lower_query = query:lower() local lim = math.max(tonumber(limit) or 1, 1)
local matches = {} local total = 0
if GCH.db then local pattern = "%" .. query:gsub("([%%_])", "\\%1") .. "%"
local count_sql, count_stmt if channel_key == "all" then count_sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM messages WHERE msg LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\' COLLATE NOCASE" count_stmt = GCH.db:prepare(count_sql) if count_stmt then count_stmt:bind_values(pattern) end else count_sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM messages WHERE channel = ? AND msg LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\' COLLATE NOCASE" count_stmt = GCH.db:prepare(count_sql) if count_stmt then count_stmt:bind_values(channel_key, pattern) end end if count_stmt then for row in count_stmt:nrows() do total = row.c end count_stmt:finalize() end
local sql, stmt if channel_key == "all" then sql = "SELECT channel, ts, msg, decho FROM messages WHERE msg LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\' COLLATE NOCASE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT ?" stmt = GCH.db:prepare(sql) if stmt then stmt:bind_values(pattern, lim) end else sql = "SELECT channel, ts, msg, decho FROM messages WHERE channel = ? AND msg LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\' COLLATE NOCASE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT ?" stmt = GCH.db:prepare(sql) if stmt then stmt:bind_values(channel_key, pattern, lim) end end if stmt then local desc = {} for row in stmt:nrows() do desc[#desc + 1] = { channel = row.channel, ts = tonumber(row.ts), msg = row.msg, decho = row.decho } end stmt:finalize() for i = #desc, 1, -1 do matches[#matches + 1] = desc[i] end end end
for _, r in ipairs(GCH.read_pending_rows(channel_key)) do if r.msg:lower():find(lower_query, 1, true) then matches[#matches + 1] = r total = total + 1 end end
return trim_tail(matches, lim), total end
function GCH.ensure_buffer() GCH.buffer = GCH.buffer or {} end
function GCH.buffer_limit() return math.max(tonumber(GCH.state.display_size) or 500, 500) end
function GCH.strip_ansi(text) local s = tostring(text or "") s = s:gsub("\27%[[%d;?]*[%a]", "") s = s:gsub("\27%[[%d;?]*[ -/]*[@-~]", "") return s end
function GCH.clean_message(text) local s = tostring(text or "") s = s:gsub("^%{chan ch=[^}]+%}%s*", "") s = s:gsub("^%{say%}%s*", "") s = s:gsub("^%{tell%}%s*", "") s = s:gsub("^%{mobsay%}%s*", "") s = GCH.strip_ansi(s) s = s:gsub("\r", "") return s end
function GCH.history_key_for_tab(tab) return GCH.tab_to_history[tab] end
function GCH.channel_key_for_tab(tab) return GCH.tab_to_channel_key[tab] end
function GCH.history_enabled_for_tab(tab) local key = GCH.history_key_for_tab(tab) if not key then return false end return GCH.state.history_enabled[key] ~= false end
function GCH.format_timestamp(ts) return os.date("%d %b %H:%M:%S", ts or os.time()) end
function GCH.format_line(msg, ts) local text = tostring(msg or "") if GCH.state.show_timestamp then return string.format("[%s] %s", GCH.format_timestamp(ts), text) end return text end
function GCH.print_main(text) echo(tostring(text or "") .. "\n") end
function GCH.debug_log(text) if not (GCH.state and GCH.state.debug) then return end cecho(string.format("\n<orange_red>[gcom debug]<grey> %s\n", tostring(text or ""))) end
function GCH.normalize_channel(ch) local s = (ch or ""):lower() if s == "group" then return "Group" end if s == "question" then return "Question" end if s == "private" then return "Question" end if s == "gtell" then return "Group" end if s == "gchan" then return "Gchan" end if s == "clantalk" then return "Clan" end if s == "gclan" then return "Clan" end if s == "spouse" then return "Spouse" end if s == "tell" then return "Tell" end if s == "say" then return "Say" end if s == "mobsay" then return "Say" end return nil end
GCH.history_channel_inputs = { { "question", "question" }, { "wangrp", "question" }, { "private", "question" }, { "all", "all" }, { "group", "group" }, { "gtell", "group" }, { "tell", "tell" }, { "say", "say" }, { "mobsay", "say" }, { "spouse", "spouse" }, { "clan", "clan" }, { "clantalk", "clan" }, { "gclan", "clan" }, { "gchan", "gchan" }, }
function GCH.allowed_history_channel_names() local names = {} for _, item in ipairs(GCH.history_channel_inputs) do names[#names + 1] = item[1] end return table.concat(names, ", ") end
function GCH.history_channel_key_from_input(ch) local lower = tostring(ch or ""):lower() for _, item in ipairs(GCH.history_channel_inputs) do if lower == item[1] then return item[2] end end return nil end
function GCH.require_history_channel(input_name) local key = GCH.history_channel_key_from_input(input_name) if key then return key end GCH.print_main("Unknown channel: " .. tostring(input_name or "") .. ". Use one of: " .. GCH.allowed_history_channel_names()) return nil end
function GCH.aard_code_to_decho(code) local value = tostring(code or "") local key = value:match("^@([A-Za-z])$") if not key then return nil end
local rgb = GCH.aard_colors[key] if not rgb then return nil end
return string.format("<%d,%d,%d>", rgb[1], rgb[2], rgb[3]) end
function GCH.color_value_to_decho(color_value) local text = tostring(color_value or "") if text == "" then return nil end
local forced = GCH.aard_code_to_decho(text) if forced then return forced end
if type(cecho2decho) == "function" then local ok, value = pcall(cecho2decho, string.format("<%s>sample<reset>", text)) if ok and type(value) == "string" then local prefix = value:match("^(.-)sample") if prefix and prefix ~= "" then return prefix end end end
return nil end
function GCH.normalize_color_value(value) local text = tostring(value or "") if text == "" then return nil end
local lower = text:lower() if lower == "off" or lower == "clear" or lower == "default" or lower == "none" then return false end
return text end
function GCH.channel_label(channel_key) return GCH.channel_labels[channel_key] or tostring(channel_key or "") end
function GCH.expand_aard_codes_to_cecho(text) return tostring(text or ""):gsub("@([A-Za-z])", function(code) local rgb = GCH.aard_colors[code] if not rgb then return "@" .. code end return string.format("<%d,%d,%d>", rgb[1], rgb[2], rgb[3]) end) end
function GCH.has_color_markup(text) local raw = tostring(text or "") return raw:find("<[^>]+>") ~= nil or raw:find("@[A-Za-z]") ~= nil end
function GCH.message_markup_to_decho(text, fallback_color) local expanded = GCH.expand_aard_codes_to_cecho(text) if fallback_color and fallback_color ~= "" and not GCH.has_color_markup(text) then expanded = string.format("<%s>%s", tostring(fallback_color), expanded) end
if type(cecho2decho) == "function" then local ok, value = pcall(cecho2decho, expanded .. "<reset>") if ok and value and value ~= "" then return value end end
return nil end
function GCH.gchan_tag_decho() return "<255,77,77>[<255,255,255>GCHAN<255,77,77>]" end
function GCH.gchan_echo_decho(msg) local message_decho = GCH.message_markup_to_decho(msg, GCH.state.gchan_color or GCH.gchan_default_color) if message_decho and message_decho ~= "" then return string.format("%s %s", GCH.gchan_tag_decho(), message_decho) end return string.format("%s %s", GCH.gchan_tag_decho(), tostring(msg or "")) end
function GCH.echo_gchan_main(rendered_decho, plain_text) if rendered_decho and rendered_decho ~= "" and type(decho) == "function" then decho(rendered_decho .. "\n") else echo(tostring(plain_text or "") .. "\n") end if type(resetFormat) == "function" then pcall(resetFormat) end end
function GCH.render_history_line(msg, ts, channel_key, rendered_decho) local prefix_plain, prefix_decho = GCH.timestamp_prefix(ts) local text = tostring(msg or "")
if rendered_decho and rendered_decho ~= "" then decho(prefix_decho .. rendered_decho .. "\n") elseif channel_key == "gchan" and GCH.state.gchan_color and GCH.state.gchan_color ~= "" then local forced = GCH.color_value_to_decho(GCH.state.gchan_color) if forced then decho(prefix_decho .. forced .. text .. "\n") else cecho(prefix_plain .. GCH.expand_aard_codes_to_cecho(text) .. "\n") end else echo(prefix_plain .. text .. "\n") end
if type(resetFormat) == "function" then pcall(resetFormat) end end
function GCH.add_message(tab, raw_text, ts, source, rendered_decho) GCH.ensure_buffer()
local clean = GCH.clean_message(raw_text) if clean == "" then return end
local stamp = ts or os.time() local origin = source or "unknown"
if GCH.last_append and GCH.last_append.tab == tab and GCH.last_append.msg == clean and GCH.last_append.ts == stamp and GCH.last_append.source ~= origin then GCH.debug_log(string.format("duplicate suppressed source=%s previous=%s tab=%s msg='%s'", tostring(origin), tostring(GCH.last_append.source), tostring(tab or "All"), clean)) return end
local item = { tab = tab, channel_key = GCH.channel_key_for_tab(tab), msg = clean, ts = stamp, source = origin, decho = rendered_decho, }
GCH.last_append = { tab = tab, msg = clean, ts = stamp, source = origin, }
GCH.buffer[#GCH.buffer + 1] = item while #GCH.buffer > GCH.buffer_limit() do table.remove(GCH.buffer, 1) end
local channel_key = item.channel_key if channel_key and channel_key ~= "all" and GCH.state.history_enabled[channel_key] ~= false then GCH.append_pending({ channel = channel_key, ts = item.ts, msg = clean, decho = rendered_decho }) GCH.maybe_drain() end
GCH.debug_log(string.format("append source=%s tab=%s msg='%s' colored=%s", tostring(item.source), tostring(tab or "All"), clean, tostring(item.decho ~= nil))) GCH.refresh_windows() end function GCH.timestamp_prefix(ts) if not GCH.state.show_timestamp then return "", "" end
local prefix = string.format("[%s] ", GCH.format_timestamp(ts)) local prefix_decho
if type(cecho2decho) == "function" then local ok, value = pcall(cecho2decho, "<white>" .. prefix .. "<reset>") if ok and value then prefix_decho = value end end
if not prefix_decho then prefix_decho = "<255,255,255>" .. prefix end
return prefix, prefix_decho end
function GCH.console_echo(con, item) if not con or not item then return end
local prefix_plain, prefix_decho = GCH.timestamp_prefix(item.ts)
if item.decho and con.decho then con:decho(prefix_decho .. item.decho .. "\n") elseif item.decho then decho(con.name, prefix_decho .. item.decho .. "\n") elseif con.echo then con:echo(prefix_plain .. item.msg .. "\n") else echo(con.name, prefix_plain .. item.msg .. "\n") end
if type(resetFormat) == "function" then pcall(resetFormat, con.name) end end
function GCH.get_console_columns(con) if not con then return 80 end
local cols if con.getColumnCount then local ok, value = pcall(function() return con:getColumnCount() end) if ok then cols = tonumber(value) end end
if (not cols or cols < 1) and type(getColumnCount) == "function" then local ok, value = pcall(getColumnCount, con.name) if ok then cols = tonumber(value) end end
if not cols or cols < 1 then local width = tonumber(con.get_width and con:get_width() or nil) or tonumber(GCH.ui.container and GCH.ui.container.get_width and GCH.ui.container:get_width() or nil) or 600 local fontsize = tonumber(GCH.state.fontsize) or 9 cols = math.floor(width / math.max(5, fontsize * 0.58)) end
return math.max(20, math.floor(cols)) end
function GCH.update_wrap() if not (GCH.ui and GCH.ui.consoles) then return end
for _, con in pairs(GCH.ui.consoles) do if con.enableAutoWrap then pcall(function() con:enableAutoWrap() end) end local cols = GCH.get_console_columns(con) if con.setWrap then pcall(function() con:setWrap(cols) end) elseif type(setWindowWrap) == "function" then pcall(setWindowWrap, con.name, cols) end end end
function GCH.redraw_console(tab) local con = GCH.ui and GCH.ui.consoles and GCH.ui.consoles[tab] if not con then return end
if con.clear then con:clear() elseif type(clearWindow) == "function" then clearWindow(con.name) end
for _, item in ipairs(GCH.buffer or {}) do if tab == "All" or item.tab == tab then GCH.console_echo(con, item) end end end
function GCH.redraw_all() if not (GCH.ui and GCH.ui.consoles) then return end
GCH.update_wrap() for _, tab in ipairs(GCH.tab_order) do GCH.redraw_console(tab) end end
function GCH.defer_refresh() if GCH.refresh_timer and type(killTimer) == "function" then pcall(killTimer, GCH.refresh_timer) GCH.refresh_timer = nil end
if type(tempTimer) == "function" then GCH.refresh_timer = tempTimer(0.05, function() GCH.refresh_timer = nil GCH.redraw_all() end) else GCH.redraw_all() end end
function GCH.refresh_windows() GCH.ensure_ui() GCH.defer_refresh() end
function GCH.apply_tab_styles() for tab, lbl in pairs(GCH.ui.tabs) do if tab == GCH.state.active_tab then lbl:setStyleSheet("background-color: #2478c8; border: 1px solid #4a4a4a; qproperty-alignment: AlignCenter;") else lbl:setStyleSheet("background-color: #161616; border: 1px solid #4a4a4a; qproperty-alignment: AlignCenter;") end end end
function GCH.set_tab(tab) if not GCH.ui.consoles[tab] then return end
for name, con in pairs(GCH.ui.consoles) do if name == tab then con:show() else con:hide() end end
GCH.state.active_tab = tab GCH.apply_tab_styles() GCH.save_settings() end
function GCH.tab_click(tab, event) if event and event.button and event.button ~= "LeftButton" then return end GCH.set_tab(tab) end
function GCH.hook_container_resize() local container = GCH.ui and GCH.ui.container if not container or container._gch_resize_hooked then return end container._gch_resize_hooked = true
if type(container.resize) == "function" then local original_resize = container.resize container.resize = function(self, ...) local results = { original_resize(self, ...) } GCH.defer_refresh() return unpack_fn(results) end end
if type(container.reposition) == "function" then local original_reposition = container.reposition container.reposition = function(self, ...) local results = { original_reposition(self, ...) } GCH.defer_refresh() return unpack_fn(results) end end end
function GCH.ensure_ui() if not Geyser then return end
if not GCH.ui.container then local container
if Adjustable and Adjustable.Container and Adjustable.Container.new then local ok, adj = pcall(function() return Adjustable.Container:new({ name = "GCHContainer", x = GCH.state.x, y = GCH.state.y, width = GCH.state.width, height = GCH.state.height, adjLabelstyle = "border: 1px solid #4a4a4a; background-color: #101010;", buttonstyle = "", lockStyle = "border: 0px;", titleText = "", titleTxtColor = "white", }) end) if ok then container = adj end end
if not container then container = Geyser.Container:new({ name = "GCHContainer", x = GCH.state.x, y = GCH.state.y, width = GCH.state.width, height = GCH.state.height, }) if container.enableDrag then container:enableDrag() end end
GCH.ui.container = container
GCH.ui.tabbar = Geyser.Container:new({ name = "GCHTabBar", x = 0, y = 0, width = "100%", height = 20, }, container)
local tab_width = math.floor(100 / #GCH.tab_order) for i, tab in ipairs(GCH.tab_order) do local x = ((i - 1) * tab_width) .. "%"
GCH.ui.tabs[tab] = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "GCHTab_" .. tab, x = x, y = 0, width = tab_width .. "%", height = "100%", message = tab, }, GCH.ui.tabbar)
GCH.ui.tabs[tab]:setClickCallback("GCH.tab_click", tab)
GCH.ui.consoles[tab] = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({ name = "GCHConsole_" .. tab, x = 0, y = 20, width = "100%", height = "100%-20px", }, container)
GCH.ui.consoles[tab]:setColor(0, 0, 0, 120) if GCH.ui.consoles[tab].enableAutoWrap then pcall(function() GCH.ui.consoles[tab]:enableAutoWrap() end) end GCH.ui.consoles[tab]:setFontSize(tonumber(GCH.state.fontsize) or 9)
if tab ~= GCH.state.active_tab then GCH.ui.consoles[tab]:hide() end end end
GCH.hook_container_resize() GCH.apply_tab_styles() GCH.update_wrap()
if GCH.state.visible then GCH.ui.container:show() else GCH.ui.container:hide() end end
function GCH.print_history_item(channel_key, item) GCH.render_history_line(item.msg, item.ts, channel_key, item.decho) end
function GCH.show_history(chan) local key = GCH.require_history_channel(chan) if not key then return end
local limit = tonumber(GCH.state.display_size) or 500 local rows = GCH.fetch_history(key, limit)
GCH.print_main(string.format("History %s (%d shown)", key, #rows)) for _, item in ipairs(rows) do GCH.print_history_item(item.channel or key, item) end end
function GCH.search_history(chan, needle) local key = GCH.require_history_channel(chan) if not key then return end
local query = tostring(needle or "") if query == "" then return GCH.print_main("searchhistory requires a search string") end
local limit = tonumber(GCH.state.display_size) or 500 local rows, total = GCH.fetch_search(key, query, limit)
GCH.print_main(string.format("Search %s for '%s' (%d shown of %d)", key, needle, #rows, total)) for _, item in ipairs(rows) do GCH.print_history_item(item.channel or key, item) end end
function GCH.capture_colored_message(msg) local colored
if type(copy2decho) == "function" then local ok, value = pcall(copy2decho, msg) if ok and value and value ~= "" then colored = value end end
return colored end
function GCH.gag_current_tag(tag_text, replacement_text) if not GCH.state.gag_channel_tags then return end
local tag = tostring(tag_text or "") if tag ~= "" and type(selectString) == "function" and type(replace) == "function" then local ok, found = pcall(selectString, tag .. " ", 1) if ok and found and found > -1 then pcall(replace, "") return end
ok, found = pcall(selectString, tag, 1) if ok and found and found > -1 then pcall(replace, "") return end end
if replacement_text ~= nil and type(selectCurrentLine) == "function" and type(replace) == "function" then pcall(selectCurrentLine) pcall(replace, tostring(replacement_text or "")) end end
function GCH.capture_tagged_line(raw_chan, msg, tag_text, source) local channel = tostring(raw_chan or "") local text = tostring(msg or "") if channel == "" or text == "" then return end
local tab = GCH.normalize_channel(channel) local colored = GCH.capture_colored_message(text)
GCH.debug_log(string.format("tag-line detected chan='%s' tab='%s' msg='%s' copied=%s", tostring(channel), tostring(tab or "nil"), tostring(text), tostring(colored ~= nil))) GCH.add_message(tab, text, os.time(), source or "tag", colored) GCH.gag_current_tag(tag_text, GCH.clean_message(text)) end
function GCH.on_tagged_channel_line(m) if type(m) ~= "table" then return end GCH.capture_tagged_line(m[2] or "", m[3] or "", "{chan ch=" .. tostring(m[2] or "") .. "}", "tag") end
function GCH.on_simple_tag_line(channel_name, m) if type(m) ~= "table" then return end local raw_chan = tostring(channel_name or "") local msg = m[2] or "" GCH.capture_tagged_line(raw_chan, msg, "{" .. raw_chan .. "}", raw_chan .. "-tag") end function GCH.on_gmcp_channel() local comm = (gmcp and gmcp.comm and gmcp.comm.channel) or (gmcp and gmcp.Comm and gmcp.Comm.Channel)
if type(comm) ~= "table" then GCH.debug_log("gmcp channel event fired but payload was not a table") if type(gmcp) == "table" then local has_comm = type(gmcp.comm) == "table" local has_Comm = type(gmcp.Comm) == "table" GCH.debug_log(string.format("gmcp snapshot: comm=%s Comm=%s", tostring(has_comm), tostring(has_Comm))) else GCH.debug_log("gmcp root table missing") end return end
local raw_chan = comm.chan or comm.channel or comm.name or "" local raw_msg = comm.msg or comm.text or comm.message or "" local tab = GCH.normalize_channel(raw_chan) local msg = tostring(raw_msg or "") local colored
if type(ansi2decho) == "function" then local ok, value = pcall(ansi2decho, msg) if ok and value and value ~= "" then colored = value end end
GCH.debug_log(string.format("detected chan='%s' tab='%s' msg='%s' colored=%s", tostring(raw_chan or ""), tostring(tab or "nil"), msg, tostring(colored ~= nil)))
if msg == "" then GCH.debug_log("message was empty; skipping append") return end
if not tab then GCH.debug_log("channel was not mapped to a dedicated tab; appending to All only") end
GCH.add_message(tab, msg, os.time(), "gmcp", colored) end
function GCH.send_gchan(text) if GCH._expanding_gchan_alias then return end
local msg = tostring(text or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if msg == "" then return GCH.print_main("Usage: gchan <message>") end
local gchan_command = "gchan " .. msg
if type(expandAlias) == "function" then GCH._expanding_gchan_alias = true pcall(expandAlias, gchan_command, false) GCH._expanding_gchan_alias = nil elseif type(send) == "function" then send(gchan_command, false) end
local tagged = "[GCHAN] " .. msg local tagged_decho = GCH.gchan_echo_decho(msg) GCH.add_message("Gchan", tagged, os.time(), "gchan-send", tagged_decho)
if GCH.state.gchan_echo then GCH.echo_gchan_main(tagged_decho, tagged) end end
function GCH.help() cecho("\n<cyan>g_channels commands\n") cecho(" <white>gcom help<grey> - show this help\n") cecho(" <white>gcom show|hide<grey> - show or hide the window\n") cecho(" <white>gcom fontsize <size><grey> - change font size and rewrap\n") cecho(" <white>gcom reset<grey> - reset defaults\n") cecho(" <white>gcom history <channel> on|off<grey> - toggle history persistence per channel\n") cecho(" <white>gcom <channel> history on|off<grey> - alternate history toggle syntax\n") cecho(" <white>gcom displaysize [n]<grey> - set/show number of history lines to show\n") cecho(" <white>gcom showhistory <channel><grey> - print channel history in main window\n") cecho(" <white>gcom searchhistory <channel> <text><grey> - search channel history\n") cecho(" <white>gcom timestamp [on|off|toggle]<grey> - toggle timestamps in windows/history\n") cecho(" <white>gcom debug on|off<grey> - echo GMCP detection/debug details\n") cecho(" <white>gcom gagtags on|off<grey> - hide/show only channel tags on tagged lines\n") cecho(" <white>gcom gchanecho on|off<grey> - toggle outgoing gchan echo in main display\n") cecho(" <white>gcom gchancolor <value><grey> - set color used for outgoing gchan lines\n") cecho(" <white>gchan <text><grey> - send text to gchan and capture it in All/Gchan history\n") end
function GCH.command(arg) local raw = tostring(arg or "") raw = raw:gsub("^%s*gcom%s*", "") local cmd = raw:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if cmd == "" then return GCH.help() end
local lcmd = cmd:lower()
if lcmd == "help" then return GCH.help() elseif lcmd == "show" then GCH.state.visible = true GCH.ensure_ui() GCH.ui.container:show() GCH.save_settings() return GCH.print_main("g_channels: window shown") elseif lcmd == "hide" then GCH.state.visible = false GCH.ensure_ui() GCH.ui.container:hide() GCH.save_settings() return GCH.print_main("g_channels: window hidden") elseif lcmd == "reset" then GCH.state = {} GCH.merge_defaults() if GCH.ui and GCH.ui.container then GCH.ui.container:move(GCH.state.x, GCH.state.y) GCH.ui.container:resize(GCH.state.width, GCH.state.height) end for _, con in pairs(GCH.ui.consoles or {}) do con:setFontSize(tonumber(GCH.state.fontsize) or 9) end GCH.save_settings() GCH.refresh_windows() return GCH.print_main("g_channels: settings reset") end
local hchan, hmode = lcmd:match("^history%s+(%S+)%s+(on|off)$") if hchan and hmode then local key = GCH.require_history_channel(hchan) if not key then return end GCH.state.history_enabled[key] = (hmode == "on") GCH.save_settings() return GCH.print_main(string.format("History %s: %s", key, hmode)) end
local hchan2, hmode2 = lcmd:match("^(%S+)%s+history%s+(on|off)$") if hchan2 and hmode2 then local key = GCH.require_history_channel(hchan2) if not key then return end GCH.state.history_enabled[key] = (hmode2 == "on") GCH.save_settings() return GCH.print_main(string.format("History %s: %s", key, hmode2)) end
local ds = tonumber(lcmd:match("^displaysize%s+(%d+)$")) if ds then if ds < 1 then ds = 1 end GCH.state.display_size = ds GCH.save_settings() GCH.refresh_windows() return GCH.print_main("Display size set to " .. ds) end if lcmd == "displaysize" then return GCH.print_main("Display size: " .. tostring(GCH.state.display_size)) end
if lcmd == "showhistory" then local active = GCH.history_key_for_tab(GCH.state.active_tab) if not active then return GCH.print_main("Usage: gcom showhistory <channel>") end return GCH.show_history(active) end
local show_chan = lcmd:match("^showhistory%s+(%S+)$") if show_chan then return GCH.show_history(show_chan) end
local search_chan, search_text = cmd:match("^searchhistory%s+(%S+)%s+(.+)$") if search_chan and search_text then return GCH.search_history(search_chan, search_text) end
local ts_arg = lcmd:match("^timestamp%s*(%S*)$") if ts_arg ~= nil then if ts_arg == "" or ts_arg == "toggle" then GCH.state.show_timestamp = not GCH.state.show_timestamp elseif ts_arg == "on" then GCH.state.show_timestamp = true elseif ts_arg == "off" then GCH.state.show_timestamp = false else return GCH.print_main("Usage: gcom timestamp [on|off|toggle]") end GCH.save_settings() GCH.refresh_windows() return GCH.print_main("Timestamp: " .. (GCH.state.show_timestamp and "on" or "off")) end
local dbg_arg = lcmd:match("^debug%s+(%S+)$") if dbg_arg then local dbg = dbg_arg:lower() if dbg ~= "on" and dbg ~= "off" then return GCH.print_main("Usage: gcom debug on|off") end GCH.state.debug = (dbg == "on") GCH.save_settings() GCH.print_main("Debug: " .. dbg) if GCH.state.debug then GCH.debug_log("debug enabled; waiting for gmcp.comm.channel events") else cecho("\n<orange_red>[gcom debug]<grey> debug disabled\n") end return end
local gag_arg = lcmd:match("^gagtags%s+(%S+)$") if gag_arg then if gag_arg ~= "on" and gag_arg ~= "off" then return GCH.print_main("Usage: gcom gagtags on|off") end GCH.state.gag_channel_tags = (gag_arg == "on") GCH.save_settings() return GCH.print_main("Gag tagged lines: " .. gag_arg) end
local gchan_echo_arg = lcmd:match("^gchanecho%s+(%S+)$") if gchan_echo_arg then if gchan_echo_arg ~= "on" and gchan_echo_arg ~= "off" then return GCH.print_main("Usage: gcom gchanecho on|off") end GCH.state.gchan_echo = (gchan_echo_arg == "on") GCH.save_settings() return GCH.print_main("Gchan main echo: " .. gchan_echo_arg) end
local font = tonumber(lcmd:match("^fontsize%s+(%d+)$")) if font then GCH.state.fontsize = font for _, con in pairs(GCH.ui.consoles or {}) do con:setFontSize(font) end GCH.save_settings() GCH.refresh_windows() return GCH.print_main("Font size set to " .. font) end
local gchan_color = cmd:match("^gchancolor%s+(.+)$") if gchan_color then gchan_color = tostring(gchan_color):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") local normalized = GCH.normalize_color_value(gchan_color) if normalized == nil or normalized == false then return GCH.print_main("Usage: gcom gchancolor <value>") end GCH.state.gchan_color = normalized GCH.save_settings() return GCH.print_main("Gchan color set to " .. normalized) end
GCH.help() end
function GCH.on_exit() GCH.drain_pending() GCH.save_settings() GCH.close_db() end
function GCH.init() GCH.load_settings() GCH.open_db() GCH.drain_pending() GCH.ensure_ui()
for _, con in pairs(GCH.ui.consoles or {}) do con:setFontSize(tonumber(GCH.state.fontsize) or 9) end
GCH.redraw_all()
if not GCH.handlers_registered then GCH.handlers_registered = true GCH.gmcp_handler_1 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.comm.channel", "GCH.on_gmcp_channel") GCH.gmcp_handler_2 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Comm.Channel", "GCH.on_gmcp_channel") GCH.resize_handler = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysWindowResizeEvent", "GCH.defer_refresh") GCH.exit_handler = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysExitEvent", "GCH.on_exit") end
if GCH.tag_trigger_id and type(killTrigger) == "function" then pcall(killTrigger, GCH.tag_trigger_id) GCH.tag_trigger_id = nil end
if type(killTrigger) == "function" and type(GCH.tag_trigger_ids) == "table" then for _, trig_id in ipairs(GCH.tag_trigger_ids) do pcall(killTrigger, trig_id) end end
GCH.tag_trigger_ids = {} GCH.tag_trigger_ids[#GCH.tag_trigger_ids + 1] = tempRegexTrigger("^\{chan ch=([^}]+)\}(.*)$", [[GCH.on_tagged_channel_line(matches)]]) GCH.tag_trigger_ids[#GCH.tag_trigger_ids + 1] = tempRegexTrigger("^\{say\}(.*)$", [[GCH.on_simple_tag_line("say", matches)]]) GCH.tag_trigger_ids[#GCH.tag_trigger_ids + 1] = tempRegexTrigger("^\{tell\}(.*)$", [[GCH.on_simple_tag_line("tell", matches)]]) GCH.tag_trigger_ids[#GCH.tag_trigger_ids + 1] = tempRegexTrigger("^\{mobsay\}(.*)$", [[GCH.on_simple_tag_line("mobsay", matches)]]) GCH.debug_log("initialized: state loaded, handlers active, tag triggers refreshed") end
GCH.init()
